text_response: CadenceWorker is a transformation table that tracks project task allocation across cost centers, functions, and geographies. The core business logic consists of a multi-rule AC (Actual Cost) reallocation pipeline: (1) Rule Alloc1a redistributes Global (unallocated) country rows to country-specific rows when Function and FunctionCountry match, weighted by Task_PeriodApprovedUnits (fallback: Task_PlannedTotalUnits). (2) Rule Alloc1b performs similar redistribution but matches on Department and FunctionCountry instead, aggregating Global rows before distribution. (3) Rule Alloc1c creates child rows (ParentRowID reference) for task-level backfill, inserting new records rather than updating existing ones, to preserve detailed allocation audit trails. All three rules process Global task records with PENDING status and non-zero actual cost/hours, distributing these across country-specific targets using proportional weighting. Updates include TransformationPath tracking (audit chain) and AuditLog JSON metadata (allocation basis, amounts, pool sources). Processing status transitions: PENDING → PROCESSING (for CT targets receiving allocation) or COMPLETED (for NCT sources consumed).
